_comment: AMRA Level 1 draw engine constraints. Generated from draw_simulation.py (Phase B final). Do not edit manually — update draw_simulation.py and re-derive.

section_cs_targets._comment: Forced minimum chart/situational per section per draw. Sum must equal type_max.

section_i_targets._comment: Soft intermediate difficulty preference per section. Sum=8; CP structurally over-draws 1I via pattern_failure (0B+3I), net total=9I.

engine._cs_sub_sort_note: cs_subs with 0 non-CS candidates are always placed in forced positions to prevent FIX-2 quota shortfalls (e.g. PA/breakout_breakdown has 0 conceptuals)
